rulings.Case Title: LUIS HEATH VS. FELL STREET PARTNERS LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions From Plaintiff'S Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 21, 2014 line 1. DEFENDANTS FELL STREET PARTNERS LP, PHIL BOERSMA, EDWARD RATINOFF and GAVIN SACKS' Motion To Strike Portions From Plaintiff'S Second Amended Complaint Continued to November 21, 2014.Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than October 30, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: SUBRENA WALLACE VS. DELBA HODGES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 21, 2014 line 7. DEFENDANT DELBA HODGES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to allege compliance with or exemption from SFRO. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: SUBRENA WALLACE VS. DELBA HODGES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 21, 2014 line 7. DEFENDANT DELBA HODGES' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Granted with leave to amend. Paragraph 17d is stricken with leave to amend to allege basis for recovery of attorney's fees, e.g. written agreement, paragraph 13 of Form Complaint. Paragraph 17f is stricken with leave to amend to request damages no duplicative of rent already requested in the "3 Day Notice," i.e. after August 31, 2014. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. MARK CASTILLO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant To Respond To Written Discovery And Produce Documents
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 21, 2014 line 8. PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Defendant To Respond To Written Discovery And Produce Documents GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide responses to Form Interrogatories- UD; Form Interrogatories-General; and Inspection Demand within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant shall appear for deposition on October 30, 2014 or any other date mutually agreed upon by the parties no later than November 5, 2014. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $735. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MARCINA MAYWEATHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 21, 2014 line 9. DEFENDANT MARCINA MAYWEATHER's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED subject to: (1) Defendant posting $2,120 with the Court no later than October 21, 2014 by 4:00 p.m.; then (2) Defendant shall file her answer no later than October 21, 2014 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/LOT)
